# @json-express/plugin-devcert — AI Context

Local HTTPS for development: generates a locally-trusted certificate (via devcert) at boot and hands it to the transport. Production-safe: no-ops when `NODE_ENV=production`.

## Install — that is the whole integration
```
npm i @json-express/plugin-devcert
```
Discovery is automatic; installing it opts you into HTTPS. **Never import it or manage certificates in code.**

## Configuration (.env)
| Key | Default | Meaning |
|---|---|---|
| `jex.https` | `true` (when installed) | Set `false` to stay on HTTP without uninstalling |

## Notes
- First run may prompt for sudo/keychain access (certificate trust installation).
- Works with both transports: injects `express.ssl` AND `transport.fastify.ssl.*` at boot.
